text.tspan: Poverty: Share of population living on less than $30 a day, 2023
This data is adjusted for inflation and for differences in living costs between countries.
Data source: World Bank Poverty and Inequality Platform (2024)

Note: This data is expressed in 2011
international-$
. Following an update, World Bank PIP now uses 2017 international-$ for its poverty and
